Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This diagnosis is a clear and explicit indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is already diagnosed, it is highly likely that it will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially if there is ongoing management or monitoring of this condition. Therefore, based on the evidence of an existing lipid disorder, the prediction is that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be present as a diagnosis in the patient's next hospital visit.
